sql_array: CREATE TABLE bitwise_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT);
INSERT INTO bitwise_test (id, value) VALUES (1, left_shift(2, 3));
UPDATE bitwise_test SET value = left_shift(value, 2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, left_shift(value, 1) AS shifted_value FROM bitwise_test;
DELETE FROM bitwise_test WHERE id = left_shift(1, 0);
